mermaidSyntax:
gantt
  title 24-Month Multi-Site Clinical Study Timeline
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  axisFormat %b %Y

  section Phase 1 - Preparation
    IRB Approval               :p1, 2024-01-01, 60d
    Site Selection & Training  :p2, 2024-02-01, 30d
    Database Setup             :p3, 2024-03-01, 30d

  section Phase 2 - Enrollment
    Site 1 Enrollment (M4-M8)  :e1, 2024-04-01, 120d
    Site 2 Enrollment (M5-M10) :e2, 2024-05-01, 180d
    Site 3 Enrollment (M6-M12) :e3, 2024-06-01, 210d

  section Phase 3 - Treatment
    Treatment Period (M8-M16)  :t1, 2024-08-01, 240d
    3-Month Follow-up (M16-M20):t2, 2025-04-01, 120d

  section Phase 4 - Analysis
    Data Lock (M18)            :milestone, d1, 2025-06-01, 1d
    Statistical Analysis       :d2, 2025-06-01, 90d
    Manuscript Preparation     :d3, 2025-09-01, 60d
    Final Submission (M24)     :milestone, d4, 2025-12-01, 1d

  section Milestones
    DSMB Review 1 (M8)         :milestone, m1, 2024-08-01, 1d
    DSMB Review 2 (M12)        :milestone, m2, 2024-12-01, 1d
    DSMB Review 3 (M16)        :milestone, m3, 2025-04-01, 1d

failures.description: No branching pattern detected — no node has 2+ outgoing arrows
failures.suggestedFix: Ensure the AI generates branch points where the input describes parallel paths
